pageDescription: Manage marketing content, SEO, and legal pages.

layout.title: CMS layout builder
layout.subtitle: Apps and web content, SEO, blogs, and legal pages.

home.intro: Manage the four bilingual sections of the home page: hero screens, platform cards, transport cards, and the maximizing benefits block.

hero.subtitle: Home section
hero.description: Manage the hero carousel screens. Screen 1 contains exactly five animated text lines; screens 2 through 6 are supporting strings shown across the six hero states.
hero.hint: All fields are bilingual. English is left-to-right; Arabic is right-to-left.
hero.screen1Hint: Exactly five lines of text that animate in the hero carousel.

platform.subtitle: Home section
platform.description: The platform section presents Wasel through a section title, three card titles, and a featured card with title and description.

transport.subtitle: Home section
transport.description: Edit the transport cards block: bilingual titles and three card rows with image, title, and description.

maximizing.subtitle: Home section
maximizing.description: Configure the maximizing benefits area: bilingual heading, supporting line, and three benefit cards.

platformFields.title: Title
platformFields.cardTitlesHint: Short single-line titles for the three platform feature cards.
platformFields.card4Hint: A highlighted card with both a title and a longer description.

common.intro: Shared marketing fragments: app download blocks, brand strip, and compact FAQs. Each tab saves independently.

about.intro: Edit the public About page by tab. Each subsection has its own save action and optional hide toggle.

services.intro: Hero, warehouse, and advertising sections each have bilingual titles, descriptions, and rich cards with shared images.

hero.subtitle: About section
hero.description: Top of the public About page: rotating headline lines and one shared background image for all locales.
hero.hint: Hero saves independently from other About tabs. Background image is not duplicated per language.
hero.heroTitlesHint: Each line is a segment of the animated headline. Keep English and Arabic lines aligned in meaning and count when possible.
hero.bgPreviewHint: Live preview of the image visitors see behind the hero text. One asset is used for English and Arabic.
hero.bgSelected: New background selected. It will upload on save.
hero.bgUploadHint: Upload a wide, high-resolution image. It is stored once and reused for both languages.

founded.subtitle: About section
founded.description: Company origin story: title lines and supporting copy in English and Arabic.
founded.hint: Hide removes the whole section from the live site. Titles and descriptions are independent lists per language.
founded.visibilityHint: When hidden, the Founded block is omitted on the public About page for every locale.
founded.titlesHint: Short lines that introduce how the company started. Order matches the visual stack on the site.
founded.descriptionsHint: Longer paragraphs paired with the titles. Use multiline rows for each paragraph block.

standFor.subtitle: About section
standFor.description: Value cards: one shared image per card with bilingual title and description.
standFor.hint: Cards are paired by index across English and Arabic. Removing a card deletes it for both languages.
standFor.visibilityHint: Hides the entire Stand For region on the public About page when enabled.
standFor.titlesHint: Intro lines above the value cards. Keep length similar across locales for layout balance.
standFor.cardImageHint: Illustration for this card only. The same file is shown for English and Arabic visitors.
standFor.cardImageSelected: New image selected. It will upload on save.
standFor.uploadCardImageHint: PNG or JPG recommended. Replaces the current card image after save.
standFor.cardTitleHint: Short headline displayed on the card face.
standFor.cardDescriptionHint: Supporting copy under the title. Plain textarea; use line breaks for spacing.
standFor.emptyCards: No cards yet. Add your first card to describe what the company stands for.

future.subtitle: About section
future.description: Future-focused cards: image plus bilingual title lines and description lines per card.
future.hint: Each card owns its own image. Title and description are string lists so you can match multi-line layouts.
future.visibilityHint: When hidden, Future cards are not shown on the live About page.
future.cardImageHint: Visual for this future pillar. Shared across English and Arabic like other About cards.
future.cardImageSelected: New image selected. It will upload on save.
future.uploadCardImageHint: Upload replaces the stored image for this card index after save.
future.cardTitlesHint: Stacked headline fragments for this card. Add rows to match the design.
future.cardDescriptionsHint: Body copy lines under the titles. Use one row per paragraph if needed.
future.emptyCards: No future cards yet. Add cards to highlight future goals and benefits.

servicesEditor.subtitle: Services section
servicesEditor.hint: Each tab saves separately. Card images are shared per card; text fields are bilingual.

partDescription.hero: Intro strip for the services landing page: titles, description, and feature cards.
partDescription.warehouse: Warehouse and storage offering: section copy plus bilingual cards with rich descriptions.
partDescription.advertising: Advertising and growth services: same card pattern as other service tabs.

servicesEditor.sectionTitlesHint: Stacked headline fragments for this services block. Align English and Arabic count when possible.
servicesEditor.descriptionHint: Lead paragraph under the titles. Plain textarea; supports line breaks.
servicesEditor.cardImageHint: Illustration for this service card. One image for both locales.
servicesEditor.cardImageSelected: New image selected. It will upload on save.
servicesEditor.uploadCardImageHint: Upload replaces the image for this card after save.
servicesEditor.tagHint: Small label or badge above the card title (for example, feature name).
servicesEditor.cardDescriptionHint: Rich text body: formatting, lists, and embedded media are allowed.
servicesEditor.emptyCards: No cards yet. Add cards to showcase this service.

contactEditor.subtitle: Contact section
contactEditor.description: Public contact page: phones, primary inbox, department routing, address, and hours.
contactEditor.hint: Values are validated (E.164-style phone and emails). Shown on the marketing contact page and may feed apps.
contactEditor.mobileHint: Primary mobile line in international format (for example +20 1xx xxx xxxx).
contactEditor.landlineHint: Office landline; include country and area code.
contactEditor.departmentsHint: Optional routed inboxes for support, legal, privacy, and partnerships.
contactEditor.addressHint: Single-line postal address as displayed to visitors.

seo.intro: Per-route meta tags and JSON-LD. Pick a page tab, edit English and Arabic fields, then save. Invalid schema JSON is flagged before publish.

blogsNav.intro: Configure the blogs landing (info and cards) and manage individual posts under Blog items.

legalHelpLayout.title: Legal and help content
legalHelpLayout.description: Manage marketing FAQs, terms, and privacy content for both English and Arabic.

faq.title: Marketing FAQ
faq.description: Configure the public FAQ page with bilingual hero content and grouped questions with localized answers.

terms.title: Marketing terms
terms.description: Configure the public terms page with bilingual alert, hero content, and grouped sections.

hero.title: Hero
hero.description: This controls the top section of the public /terms page.
hero.hint: Update the hero title and introduction in both languages before publishing.

alert.title: Alert banner (optional)
alert.description: Optional highlighted notice displayed above the public terms content.

privacy.title: Marketing privacy
privacy.description: Configure the public privacy page with bilingual alert, hero content, and grouped sections.

hero.title: Hero
hero.description: This controls the top section of the public /policy page.
hero.hint: Update the hero title and introduction in both languages before publishing.

alert.title: Alert banner (optional)
alert.description: Optional highlighted notice displayed above the public privacy content.

blogItemsList.title: All blog items
blogItemsList.searchPlaceholder: Search by title, category, or description…
blogItemsList.emptyDescription: No items match the selected filters.
blogItemsList.confirmDeleteBody: Are you sure you want to delete "{{title}}"? This action cannot be undone.
blogItemsList.confirmDraftBody: Move "{{title}}" back to draft? It will no longer appear as published.
blogItemsList.confirmPublishBody: Publish "{{title}}" now? It will become visible as published content.

seoEditor.subtitle: SEO section
seoEditor.hint: These fields map to HTML meta tags and optional JSON-LD. Save after edits.
seoEditor.jsonInvalid: Invalid JSON format. Please enter valid JSON.
seoEditor.keywordsPlaceholderEn: Type a keyword and press comma or Enter…
seoEditor.keywordsPlaceholderAr: Type a keyword and press comma or Enter…
seoEditor.schemaHint: Structured data objects as JSON. Must parse as valid JSON.

pageDescription.home: Controls how the homepage appears in search results and social previews for each language.
pageDescription.about: Meta tags and structured data for the About page.
pageDescription.contact: SEO for the contact page. Align wording with visible contact content when possible.
pageDescription.services: How the services landing page is summarized in search engines.
pageDescription.blogs: Default SEO hints for the blogs listing; individual posts can override in the blog editor.
pageDescription.order_tracking: Helps customers find the order-tracking page from search.
pageDescription.faqs: Improves discoverability of the FAQ hub.

seoEditor.metaTitleHint: Shown in the browser tab and often as the blue link in Google.
seoEditor.metaDescriptionHint: The gray snippet under the title in search results.
seoEditor.metaDescriptionPlaceholderEn: Brief description shown in search results
seoEditor.metaDescriptionPlaceholderAr: Brief description shown in search results (Arabic)
seoEditor.altImageHint: Describes the page representative image for accessibility.
seoEditor.altImagePlaceholderEn: Descriptive alt text for the page image
seoEditor.altImagePlaceholderAr: Descriptive alt text for the page image (Arabic)
seoEditor.keywordsHint: Type a word or phrase, then comma or Enter.

app.title: Common / App section
app.hint: Download CTAs for user and driver apps.
app.description: Marketing blocks that link to App Store and Play Store. Images are shared; titles are bilingual.
app.imageSelected: New image selected. It will upload on save.

brand.title: Common / Brand section
brand.hint: Brand messaging reused across landing sections.
brand.description: Main brand title, description, and call-to-action shown in shared marketing components.
brand.brandTitleHint: Primary brand name or slogan line.
brand.brandDescriptionHint: Short paragraph explaining what Wasel offers.
brand.ctaLinkHint: Absolute URL opened when users tap the CTA.

faqs.title: Common / FAQs section
faqs.hint: Compact FAQ list embedded in shared layouts.
faqs.description: Section heading plus paired question-answer rows in English and Arabic.
faqs.faqsDescriptionHint: Optional intro sentence under the title.
faqs.question: Question
faqs.questionHint: Visible question label in each language.

blogsInfoEditor.subtitle: Blogs section
blogsInfoEditor.description: Landing copy above the article grid: bilingual section title, rich intro, and highlight cards.
blogsInfoEditor.hint: Cards are paired by index. Adding or removing syncs English and Arabic.
blogsInfoEditor.sectionTitleHint: Main heading for the blogs landing area.
blogsInfoEditor.timeToReadSharedHint: Display string such as 5 min read.
blogsInfoEditor.title: Title
blogsInfoEditor.descriptionHint: Short teaser body for the card.

blogItemEditor.subtitle: Blog items
blogItemEditor.description: One article per locale: pick language, write rich content, tune SEO, then publish or schedule.
blogItemEditor.hint: Use Save to open the publish modal. Drafts may omit cover; publishing or scheduling usually requires a cover image.
blogItemEditor.schemaHint: Optional structured data for this article. Each block must be valid JSON.
blogItemEditor.coverImageHint: Shown in listings and at the top of the article. Required when publishing or scheduling.
blogItemEditor.newImageSelected: New image selected - will upload on save.
blogItemEditor.uploadCoverImageHint: PNG, JPG, WebP, or SVG. Replaces the stored URL after save.
blogItemEditor.localeHint: This post is stored for one language. Create a second item for the other locale if needed.
blogItemEditor.title: Title
blogItemEditor.titleHint: Public article headline and default H1 unless the template overrides it.
blogItemEditor.categoryHint: Type to filter or add a label. Used for grouping and filters on the blogs page.
blogItemEditor.timeToReadHint: Integer minutes for reading badges. Minimum 1.
blogItemEditor.descriptionHint: Full article body. Images and videos upload to storage; use the toolbar for formatting.
blogItemEditor.seoDescription: Search snippet overrides for this post.
blogItemEditor.metaTitleHint: Override for the HTML title tag and search link text.
blogItemEditor.keywordsHint: Comma or Enter separated tags for this article.
blogItemEditor.keywordsPlaceholder: Type a keyword and press comma or Enter...
blogItemEditor.metaDescriptionPlaceholder: Brief description shown in search results

errors.timeToReadMin: Time to read must be at least 1 minute.
errors.coverRequired: Cover image is required for publish or schedule actions.
errors.releaseDateRequired: Release date is required for scheduled posts.
errors.releaseDatePast: Release date cannot be in the past.

marketingNested.heroDescription: This controls the top section of the public FAQs page.
marketingNested.heroHint: Update the hero title and introduction in both languages before publishing.
marketingNested.heroTitleLinesHint: At least two lines are required because the public hero uses a split headline style.
marketingNested.introDescriptionHint: This short intro appears under the hero title on the public page.
marketingNested.categoriesAndQuestionsDescription: Every category, question, and answer must exist in English and Arabic.
marketingNested.categoriesAndQuestionsHint: Category key is generated automatically from English category name to link EN and AR groups.
marketingNested.categoryHint: Choose a category to append a new bilingual item.
marketingNested.noCategoriesForFilter: No categories available for this audience filter.
marketingNested.selectCategoryFirstDesc: Choose a category from the selector above to display and edit its items.
marketingNested.question: Question
marketingNested.answerHint: Rich text supports formatting and media uploads.
marketingNested.manageCategoriesDescription: Create categories in Arabic and English, or view and delete existing categories.

categoryModal.newDetailsDescription: Fill both language names. Category key is generated automatically from English.
categoryModal.categoryNameHint: Category key is generated automatically from the English name.
categoryModal.audienceHintPublic: Who sees this category on the public page.
categoryModal.whatWillHappenDescription: After adding, the category appears in the list tab and you can start adding FAQ items under it immediately.
categoryModal.existingCategoriesDescriptionFaq: Deleting a category will delete all FAQ items inside it.
categoryModal.existingCategoriesDescriptionShared: Deleting a category will delete all items inside it.
categoryModal.noCategoriesFoundDescription: We couldn't find categories for the selected audience.
categoryModal.deleteConfirmFaq: Deleting {{name}} will cascade delete all FAQ items inside this category in both English and Arabic.
categoryModal.deleteConfirmShared: Deleting {{name}} will cascade delete all items inside this category in both English and Arabic.

marketingNested.alertBannerHint: Optional rich-text notice displayed at the top of the public page.

publishModal.createDescription: Choose how you want this blog item to be saved.
publishModal.updateDescription: Choose the status for this blog update.
publishModal.releaseDateHint: Local date and time when the post should go live. Must be in the future when you confirm.
